recap:
- The demo focuses on building a production-ready retrieval agent using Databricks Mosaic AI.
- A retrieval agent integrates large language models with an organization's knowledge base for context-aware responses.
- Key activities include testing vector search in the AI Playground and building an agent with LangChain.
- MLflow tracing is implemented for improved observability of the agent's performance.
- The final step involves registering the agent as a model for deployment in production environments.
